message:
Agent: Bosswoman MAYHASAPC controller registration check
Status: blocked_not_claimed
What Was Supposed To Happen: Claim the standalone Bosswoman controller registration for MAYHASAPC and verify Mr.SEO, ZDH Consulting, and ZDH Sales inventory without enabling always-on dispatch.
What Actually Happened: Mailbox is reachable and both registration packets were read. codex-ai-systems and bossman both pulled --ff-only and were already up to date. Controller registration cannot be honestly claimed from this runtime because the current host/user is HECHT32GIG\zev, not MAYHASAPC\meira, and the Bossman source-of-truth files named in the registration are missing on the current Bossman branch.
Root Cause: Runtime identity/profile mismatch plus missing Bossman controller artifacts after pull.
Actions Taken: Ran scripts\bosswoman-mailbox-watch.ps1 -Once; pulled C:\Repos\codex-ai-systems and C:\Repos\bossman; read controller-mailbox\bosswoman-controller.json; attempted to read C:\Repos\bossman\BOSSWOMAN_CONTROLLER.md and C:\Repos\bossman\data\controller-profiles\bosswoman.mayhasapc.json; inventoried host/user/Codex runtime/env safety and target repos.
Files/Threads Touched: controller-mailbox outbox only through send-bosswoman-reply.ps1 -Commit. No project repos edited for this registration pass.
Verification: Host=HECHT32GIG; user=HECHT32GIG\zev; USERPROFILE=C:\Users\zev. Codex Desktop detected at C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\OpenAI.Codex_26.616.5445.0_x64__2p2nqsd0c76g0\app\Codex.exe and codex bin exists at C:\Users\zev\AppData\Local\OpenAI\Codex\bin\codex.exe. Safety env vars BOSSMAN_LOCAL_RUNNER_ENABLED, BOSSMAN_ALLOW_DESKTOP_PROCESS_LAUNCH, and ZDH_ALLOW_DESKTOP_PROCESS_LAUNCH are unset. ZDH Live Manager Tick is disabled and no longer includes -AllowDesktopProcessLaunch. Bossman local runner safety patch is present locally but uncommitted in C:\Repos\bossman from emergency no-popup hardening.
Inventory: C:\Repos\Mr.SEO exists, branch main, remote origin https://github.com/zdhconsulting/Mr.SEO.git, HEAD b8918768 Add dedicated PC setup playbook, dirty with many backlog/data/report modifications. C:\Repos\zdhconsultingsite exists, branch codex/zdh-site-redesign, origin https://github.com/zdhconsulting/zdhconsultingsite.git plus zdhsales remote, HEAD ac34575 Clarify B2B proof path, dirty only untracked AGENTS.md. C:\Repos\zdhsales exists, branch main, origin https://github.com/zdhconsulting/zdhsales.git, HEAD f43336a Move expanded sales content to side pages, dirty with untracked AGENTS.md, QA screenshots, and bossman receipt JSON.
Result: Registration inventory completed, but controller claim is blocked pending correct MAYHASAPC runtime/profile artifacts.
Blockers: Missing C:\Repos\bossman\BOSSWOMAN_CONTROLLER.md; missing C:\Repos\bossman\data\controller-profiles\bosswoman.mayhasapc.json; current runtime identity does not match expected MAYHASAPC\meira; target repos have existing dirty/untracked state requiring classification before any dispatch.
Owner Button Needed: None from Zev for this pass.
Commander Approval Needed: Yes before enabling always-on dispatch, because registration is being checked from HECHT32GIG instead of MAYHASAPC and Bossman controller files are absent. AI Manager should either provide the missing files/branch/ref or send a revised registration for this host.
Critical Escalation: No production/billing/DNS/secrets/security/database/permissions touched. Do not enable worker fanout yet.
Next Best Action: Smallest safe enable step is not dispatch. First sync/add the missing Bossman controller contract/profile and rerun inventory on the intended MAYHASAPC\meira machine, or explicitly authorize HECHT32GIG\zev as this controller. Then run one mailbox-only dry safety tick with worker launch env vars unset.
System Hardening Note: Keep BOSSMAN_LOCAL_RUNNER_ENABLED unset by default and require explicit env enable for any local worker launch; this protects against the PowerShell popup loop observed earlier.
Bosswoman watcher claimed packet ai-manager-20260621-bosswoman-bootstrap. LaunchCodex=True.

Agent: Bosswoman MAYHASAPC mailbox watcher claim
Status: done
What Was Supposed To Happen: Verify MAYHASAPC/meira, update codex-ai-systems and bossman, confirm Bosswoman controller files, install the hidden mailbox watcher, run one manual tick, and reply through the mailbox without enabling broad Bossman dispatch or worker fanout.
What Actually Happened: Machine/user verified as mayhasapc/mayhasapc\meira. codex-ai-systems pulled to 1e43d05 Add Bosswoman mailbox watcher. bossman pulled to e4d71dd Register Bosswoman controller. All requested Bosswoman files exist. Hidden scheduled task ZDH Bosswoman Mailbox Watcher is installed, enabled, runs powershell.exe with -WindowStyle Hidden every 1 minute, and targets scripts\bosswoman-mailbox-tick.ps1 with -LaunchCodex. Manual tick claimed ai-manager-20260621-bosswoman-bootstrap and launched its hidden packet runner; the scheduled watcher also claimed ai-manager-20260621-bosswoman-registration. No broad Bossman dispatch, worker fanout, deploy, billing, DNS, secrets, security, database, permissions, or production account setting changes were made.
Root Cause: Prior mailbox commit failed because this repo had no local Git author identity configured. Zev provided zev@zdhconsulting.com; local repo identity is now Zev <zev@zdhconsulting.com> for C:\Repos\codex-ai-systems only.
Actions Taken: Ran hostname/whoami; git pull --ff-only and git log -1 in both repos; verified five requested file paths; installed the hidden mailbox watcher; ran one manual mailbox tick with -LaunchCodex; checked scheduled task state and watcher logs; prepared this committed mailbox reply.
Files/Threads Touched: C:\Repos\codex-ai-systems controller-mailbox outbox via watcher tick and send-bosswoman-reply.ps1; C:\Repos\codex-ai-systems local git config user.name/user.email. No Bossman project files edited locally.
Verification: Hostname=mayhasapc. User=mayhasapc\meira. Watcher task Last Result=0 and Status=Ready. Bossman files found=yes. Manual tick result=claimed bootstrap packet and started hidden runner; registration packet also claimed by the installed watcher. codex-ai-systems HEAD before mailbox reply=1e43d05. bossman HEAD=e4d71dd.
Result: Bosswoman mailbox watcher is claimed and installed on MAYHASAPC. Bossman controller docs/profile are present. Broad dispatch remains off.
Blockers: None for mailbox watcher claim. Current note: hidden packet runner processes may still be working on the claimed packets; monitor outbox/packets before enabling any wider runtime.
Owner Button Needed: None.
Commander Approval Needed: None for the watcher claim. Required before enabling broad Bossman dispatch, worker fanout, production-impact actions, or changes touching billing/DNS/secrets/security/databases/permissions.
Critical Escalation: None.
Next Best Action: Watch for the hidden packet runner return packets, then run a bounded mailbox/status read and only then decide whether to enable the smallest safe Bossman runtime lane.
System Hardening Note: Keep this watcher as mailbox-only until return packets prove stable. Add stricter native-command exit checks to the tick script later so Git commit failures cannot be logged as successful.
Bosswoman watcher claimed packet ai-manager-1782018829125-e304079e. LaunchCodex=True.
Bosswoman watcher claimed packet ai-manager-1782019679959-2b2ec69b. LaunchCodex=True.
Bosswoman watcher claimed packet ai-manager-1782019779918-3c047848. LaunchCodex=True.

Requested Action: bosswoman_readiness_probe_for_overnight_run

Owner Button Needed: None.
Commander Approval Needed: None.
Critical Escalation: None.
Next Best Action: AI Manager should repair the native action or send a narrower packet.
System Hardening Note: Native action failed closed before worker fanout.

Agent: Bosswoman MAYHASAPC native readiness
Status: ready
Machine: mayhasapc
User: mayhasapc\meira
Watcher State: State=Running; TaskPath=\
Repos Verified:
Mr.SEO: path=C:\Repos\Mr.SEO; exists=True; branch=main; expected_remote=True; dirty_count=0; dirty_preview=
ZDH Consulting: path=C:\Repos\zdhconsultingsite; exists=True; branch=codex/zdh-site-redesign; expected_remote=True; dirty_count=0; dirty_preview=
ZDH Sales: path=C:\Repos\zdhsales; exists=True; branch=main; expected_remote=True; dirty_count=1; dirty_preview=M index.html
Dirty State Summary: Dirty files exist and must be classified before commits. Mr.SEO generated-output dirt is expected; ZDH Consulting/ZDH Sales untracked files must be preserved unless the worker proves ownership.
Native Pull Results: codex-ai-systems=0 Already up to date.; bossman=0 Already up to date.
Runner Processes: pid=5308 name=powershell.exe cmd=C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File C:\Repos\codex-ai-systems\scripts\bosswoman-native-action.ps1 -PacketFile C:\Users\meira\AppData\Local\ZDH\BosswomanMailbox\packets\ai-manager-1782020205827-c8186ef5.json -RepoRoot C:\Repos\codex-ai-systems -BossmanRepo C:\Repos\bossman
Ready For Overnight Enable: yes
Blockers: None
Owner Button Needed: None.
Commander Approval Needed: None for readiness. Overnight command packet is the explicit enable.
Critical Escalation: None.
Next Best Action: AI Manager may send run_bosswoman_overnight_controlled_6h.
System Hardening Note: Readiness is now handled natively by the mailbox watcher, so a silent Codex runner cannot block the readiness gate.

Agent: Bosswoman MAYHASAPC proactive project push cycle
Status: done
What Was Supposed To Happen: Stop waiting for per-step permission and move the three named projects with safe, verified, bounded pushes.
What Actually Happened: Ran one controlled lane per repo. Mr.SEO ops loop regenerated current SEO ops artifacts and was pushed. ZDH Consulting brand labels were aligned to ZDH Consulting across shared header/footer/generated pages and verified on desktop/mobile. ZDH Sales duplicate homepage canonical tag was removed and verified.
Root Cause: Prior controller behavior stopped after mailbox setup instead of converting clean repos into verified project movement.
Actions Taken: Ran repo pulls/guards, local QA, generated checks, viewport screenshot/scroll-width checks where frontend changed, commits, and pushes.
Files/Threads Touched: C:\Repos\Mr.SEO generated ops/backlog/dashboard/report artifacts; C:\Repos\zdhconsultingsite static site brand/header/footer/CSS/generator assets; C:\Repos\zdhsales index.html; controller mailbox outbox for this receipt.
Verification: Mr.SEO scripts/run_ops_loop.py --ci passed all steps and validate_ops. ZDH Consulting npm test passed 107 pages, readiness audit clean except owner-only GA4 ID, node --check script.js passed, CDP mobile viewport measured 390 scrollWidth=390. ZDH Sales JSON/script QA passed, sitemap XML parsed, git diff --check passed, CDP measured 390 and 1280 scrollWidth equal viewport.
Result: Pushed Mr.SEO 7ca72f14 Refresh Mr.SEO ops data; pushed ZDH Consulting 7936d45 Align ZDH Consulting brand labels; pushed ZDH Sales becd88a Remove duplicate homepage canonical.
Blockers: None for safe repo movement. Known owner-only item remains ZDH Consulting GA4 production measurement ID if Zev wants live analytics changed.
Owner Button Needed: None for this push cycle.
Commander Approval Needed: None for these safe repo pushes. Still required before production-risk actions, billing, DNS, secrets, security, database, permissions, or broad worker fanout.
Critical Escalation: None.
Next Best Action: Continue rotating one bounded verified push per repo, prioritizing owner-clear SEO publishing from Mr.SEO into ZDH Consulting/ZDH Sales and small conversion/SEO hygiene fixes with screenshots.
System Hardening Note: Keep using one project lane at a time until Bosswoman has multiple clean cycles; mailbox/status should record pushed commit IDs, verification, and remaining true owner gates.
Bosswoman watcher claimed packet ai-manager-1782020470378-433cdd35. LaunchCodex=True.

Agent: Bosswoman MAYHASAPC native overnight launcher
Status: night_run_started
Machine: mayhasapc
User: mayhasapc\meira
Runtime State: Started controlled 6+ hour overnight run with max 3 initial hidden project workers and no broad Bossman dispatch.
Projects Checked:
Mr.SEO: started=True; pid=11868; started hidden worker; prompt=C:\Users\meira\AppData\Local\ZDH\BosswomanMailbox\overnight\20260621-084206\mr-seo.prompt.txt; stdout=C:\Users\meira\AppData\Local\ZDH\BosswomanMailbox\overnight\20260621-084206\mr-seo.stdout.log; stderr=C:\Users\meira\AppData\Local\ZDH\BosswomanMailbox\overnight\20260621-084206\mr-seo.stderr.log
ZDH Consulting: started=True; pid=10272; started hidden worker; prompt=C:\Users\meira\AppData\Local\ZDH\BosswomanMailbox\overnight\20260621-084206\zdh-consulting.prompt.txt; stdout=C:\Users\meira\AppData\Local\ZDH\BosswomanMailbox\overnight\20260621-084206\zdh-consulting.stdout.log; stderr=C:\Users\meira\AppData\Local\ZDH\BosswomanMailbox\overnight\20260621-084206\zdh-consulting.stderr.log
ZDH Sales: started=True; pid=13416; started hidden worker; prompt=C:\Users\meira\AppData\Local\ZDH\BosswomanMailbox\overnight\20260621-084206\zdh-sales.prompt.txt; stdout=C:\Users\meira\AppData\Local\ZDH\BosswomanMailbox\overnight\20260621-084206\zdh-sales.stdout.log; stderr=C:\Users\meira\AppData\Local\ZDH\BosswomanMailbox\overnight\20260621-084206\zdh-sales.stderr.log
Repos Verified: Project workers are required to verify path/remotes before edits and before commit/push.
Actions Taken: Created run directory C:\Users\meira\AppData\Local\ZDH\BosswomanMailbox\overnight\20260621-084206 and launched one hidden worker per project.
Verification: Native launcher verified machine/user and process start. Each project worker owns project-level verification. Monitor pid=13976.
Result: Overnight work started.
Blockers: None at launcher level.
Owner Button Needed: None.
Commander Approval Needed: None. This packet is the explicit overnight enable.
Critical Escalation: None.
Next Best Action: Wait for project receipt packets and 30-minute monitor packets. If no project lands progress within 90 minutes, monitor will classify as no_delivery_progress.
System Hardening Note: Launcher uses native mailbox control for start/status and hidden project workers only; it does not use send_message_to_thread, WinRM, deploys, or broad Bossman dispatch.
